hypothesis.H1: COMMIT guarantee boost promotes social-media from #10 to #3 in dispatch rankings
hypothesis.H2: At least 1 COMMIT-domain DOMEX lane opened within 5 sessions (S396-S400)
hypothesis.H3: Cold-domain COMMIT follow-through rises from 0% (L-794 baseline) to >0%

mechanism.before: Advisory-only: wave planner recommends COMMIT, danger boost +1.5, median floor. social-media at rank #10 (score 3.11). 0% cold-domain follow-through (L-794).
mechanism.after: Structural guarantee: top COMMIT domain score boosted to 3rd-place threshold + 0.01. social-media at rank #3 (score 3.92). Visible in dispatch header.
mechanism.code_change: dispatch_optimizer.py: ~15 LOC in _ucb1_score (guarantee boost) + ~10 LOC in run() (header display)
mechanism.enforcement_type: L-601 structural — scoring system guarantees visibility, not advisory text

prospective_test.success_criterion: At least 1 DOMEX lane opened for social-media or other COMMIT domain
